mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO data_governance_metric (check_batch_id, table_code, table_name, table_group, total_rows, row_delta_pct, latest_date, earliest_date, status, check_items, check_time, check_type) VALUES
(#{m.checkBatchId}, #{m.tableCode}, #{m.tableName}, #{m.tableGroup}, #{m.totalRows}, #{m.rowDeltaPct}, #{m.latestDate}, #{m.earliestDate}, #{m.status}, #{m.checkItems}, #{m.checkTime}, #{m.checkType})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM data_governance_metric WHERE check_batch_id = ( SELECT check_batch_id FROM data_governance_metric ORDER BY check_time DESC LIMIT 1 ) ORDER BY table_code
SELECT * FROM data_governance_metric WHERE table_code = #{tableCode} ORDER BY check_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM data_governance_metric WHERE table_code = #{tableCode} ORDER BY check_time DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
